questions.text: Which advertisement among the ones you saw was the most memorable to you?
questions.rationale: Identifies the single ad with strongest standout impact across competing operator campaigns.

questions.text: After seeing the Etisalat ads, how has your perception of the Etisalat brand changed?
questions.rationale: Measures brand perception shift driven by the ads, beyond simple likeability.

questions.text: In your own words, what could Etisalat improve in their ads to make them more appealing or convincing to you?
questions.rationale: Captures qualitative creative feedback and improvement ideas directly from consumers.
